home.title: Scan waste
home.subtitle: Take a photo of your waste to discover how to recycle it. The AI will guide you!
home.step1: Take a clear photo of your waste
home.step2: The AI identifies the object automatically
home.step3: Get the right bin and eco tips

settings.offlineAISub: On-device detection, no network. Requires native build with react-native-fast-tflite.

notifications.subtitle: Alerts and reminders
notifications.emptyMessage: Your sorting reminders and recycling tips will appear here when notifications are enabled.

history.title: History
history.subtitle: Your recent scans
history.emptyMessage: Scan a waste item to get started. Your scans will appear here.
history.noResultsMessage: No scan matches your search or filter.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Track your environmental impact
dashboard.goalHint: Keep scanning to reach your goal
dashboard.tipBody: Sorting plastic packaging correctly allows it to be recycled and reduces demand for oil.

result.correctionSaved: Correction saved. Thank you for helping improve the AI.
result.lowConfidence: We're not very sure about this detection. You can correct below to help us improve.

coach.title: Eco coach
coach.subtitle: Simple tips to sort better
coach.hello: Hello! I'm here to help you sort.
coach.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm your eco coach. Ask me about sorting, recycling (plastic, glass, paper, metal, organic) or your eco points. You can type freely.
coach.fallbackAnswer: I don't have a specific answer for that. Try asking about plastic/glass/paper recycling, waste bins, CO₂ impact, or eco points. Or scan a waste item in the app for an instant answer!
coach.suggested4: How do I earn eco points?
